resource.name: SifErrorGetBusinesses
resource.object: SIF error: Error occured when getting businesses. BusinessKey={0}

resource.name: SifErrorLoginUsername
resource.object: SIF error: The username \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Make sure the SIF login credentials are correct.

resource.name: SifErrorLoginPassword
resource.object: SIF error: The password \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Make sure the SIF login credentials are correct.

resource.name: SifFailureConnection
resource.object: Can't connect to SIF. Please check that you are connected to the internet and cables are ok. Then try exporting again.

resource.name: SifErrorGetProductConditions
resource.object: SIF error: Error occured when getting product conditions.

resource.name: SifErrorGetVessels
resource.object: SIF error: Error occured when getting vessels.

resource.name: SifErrorGetCountries
resource.object: SIF error: Error occured when getting countries.

resource.name: InvalidFishgear
resource.object: FishingGear (killMethod) {0}/{1} is not supported by Elog\n

resource.name: FishgearNotInMP
resource.object: FishingGear (killMethod) {0}/{1} is in Elog but not Marine Pack\n

resource.name: FishgearNotInMPPersonal
resource.object: FishingGear (killMethod) {0}/{1} is in Elog personal list but not Marine Pack\n

resource.name: FishgearAddFailed
resource.object: FishingGear (killMethod) {0}/{1} failed to add to Marine Pack\n

resource.name: FishgearAdded
resource.object: FishingGear (killMethod) {0}/{1} was added to Marine Pack\n

resource.name: InvalidFishgearPersonal
resource.object: FishingGear {0}/{1} was not found in personal fishgear list in Elog\n

resource.name: InvalidFishgearParam
resource.object: FishingGear {0}/{1} parameters ({2}) doesn't match Elog personal gear list ({3})\n

resource.name: FishgearPersonalFixedParams
resource.object: FishingGear {0}/{1} parameters was fixed in Marine Pack to match Elog\n

resource.name: FailFishgearValidation
resource.object: "Validation of personal FishingGear list not possible\n"

resource.name: FailFishgearParamConfiguring
resource.object: "FishingGear {0}/{1} configuring parameters failed\n"

resource.name: FishgearPersonalDeactivated
resource.object: FishingGear {0}/{1} was deactivated in Marine Pack because it was not found in the personal harbour list in Elog\n

resource.name: InvalidProduct
resource.object: Product {0}/{1} is not supported by Elog\n

resource.name: InvalidPort
resource.object: Port (company) {0}/{1} is not supported by Elog\n

resource.name: InvalidPortPersonal
resource.object: Port (company) {0}/{1} was not found in personal harbour list in Elog\n

resource.name: InvalidPortParam
resource.object: Port (company) {0}/{1} parameters ({2}) doesn't match Elog personal gear list ({3})\n

resource.name: PortPersonalDeactivated
resource.object: Port (company) {0}/{1} was deactivated in Marine Pack because it was not found in the personal harbour list in Elog\n

resource.name: FailPortValidation
resource.object: "Validation of personal harbour list not possible\n"

resource.name: PortAdded
resource.object: "Port (company) {0}/{1} was added to Marine Pack\n"

resource.name: PortAddFailed
resource.object: Port (company) {0}/{1} failed to add to Marine Pack\n

resource.name: PortNotInMPPersonal
resource.object: Port (company) {0}/{1} is in Elog personal list but not Marine Pack\n

resource.name: InvalidEcoarea
resource.object: Economical area (country) {0}/{1} is not supported by Elog\n

resource.name: InvalidNation
resource.object: Nation (country) {0}/{1} is not supported by Elog\n

resource.name: InvalidIcesarea
resource.object: ICES area (rmarea) {0}/{1} is not supported by Elog\n

resource.name: CaptainDeactivated
resource.object: Captain (master) {0} was deactivated in Marine Pack because it was not found in Elog\n

resource.name: InvalidCaptain
resource.object: Captain (master) {0} was not found in Elog\n

resource.name: CaptainAdded
resource.object: Captain/master (company) {0} was added to Marine Pack\n

resource.name: CaptainAddFailed
resource.object: Captain/master (company) {0} failed to add to Marine Pack\n

resource.name: CaptainNotInMP
resource.object: Captain/master (company) {0} is in Elog but not Marine Pack\n

resource.name: TraceExportCatches
resource.object: "Exporting Hauls. Trip {0} contains {1} hauls to export"

resource.name: TraceExportCatchesCC
resource.object: "Exporting Vessel-lots. Leftover-group {0} contains {1} vessel-lots to export"

resource.name: WarningNoLots
resource.object: "No hauls found to export, stopping export"

resource.name: WarningNoLotsCC
resource.object: "No vessel-lots found to export, stopping export"

resource.name: TraceExportCatch
resource.object: Exporting Haul (Catch). ID={0} Vessel={1} Haul={2}

resource.name: TraceExportCatchCC
resource.object: Exporting Vessel-lot (Catch). ID={0} Vessel={1} Vessel-lot={2}

resource.name: TraceExportCatchSuccess
resource.object: "Finished exporting catches with success"

resource.name: StatusExportStarted
resource.object: Exporting to SIF started...

resource.name: TraceExportBoxes
resource.object: Exporting boxes. Found {0} boxes to export for trip {1}

resource.name: TraceExportBoxesCC
resource.object: Exporting boxes. Found {0} transactions to export for leftover-group {1}

resource.name: TraceExportBoxesOrder
resource.object: Exporting boxes. Found {0} boxes to export for order {1}

resource.name: WarningNoBoxes
resource.object: No boxes found to export

resource.name: WarningCustomerNotFound
resource.object: The customer {0} was not found

resource.name: CreateSales
resource.object: Creating sales. Id={0} SalesLot={1} Buyer={2}

resource.name: WarningNoBuyerCode
resource.object: Order has no customer or customer has no SIF code

resource.name: TraceExportBox
resource.object: "Exporting box. Pack={0} RFID={1} Regs={2} ID={3} Msc:{4}"

resource.name: WarningGrai96Parse
resource.object: "Could not parse GRAI96 RFID"

resource.name: ExportSuccessfull
resource.object: Exporting to SIF finished with success

resource.name: ExportWithNotifications
resource.object: Exporting to SIF finished with notifications

resource.name: ExportFailedAt
resource.object: Exporting to SIF failed at

resource.name: FailConvertPos
resource.object: Failed to convert position {0}:\r\n{1}

resource.name: SifErrorConnect
resource.object: SIF error: Error occured when connecting to SIF. Url={0} Username={1} Password={2}

resource.name: SifErrorBusinessId
resource.object: SIF error: The BusinessId \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Make sure the BusinessId is correct and that you have the rights to send data on the behalf of it.

resource.name: SifErrorBusinessIdSale
resource.object: SIF error: The BusinessId \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Make sure the BusinessId is correct (both in config and customer assigned to order) and that you have the rights to send data on the behalf of it.

resource.name: SifErrorGetPrefix
resource.object: SIF error: Error occured when getting prefix. BusinessId={0}

resource.name: SifErrorCreateCatch
resource.object: SIF error: Error occured when creating catch. \r\nCatchInfo={0}

resource.name: SifErrorCreateTU
resource.object: SIF error: Error occured when creating box (TU). \r\nTU={0}

resource.name: SifErrorCreateSale
resource.object: SIF error: Error occured when creating sale. \r\nSale={0}

resource.name: ExportFailureConnectionSif
resource.object: Can't connect to SIF. Please check that you are connected to the internet and cables are ok. Then try exporting again.

resource.name: SifErrorLoginUsername
resource.object: SIF error: The username \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Make sure the SIF login credentials are correct.

resource.name: SifErrorLoginPassword
resource.object: SIF error: The password \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Make sure the SIF login credentials are correct.

resource.name: SifErrorVesselId
resource.object: SIF error: The VesselId \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF for this login. Make sure the SIF login credentials and VesselId are correct.

resource.name: SifErrorSpeciesId
resource.object: SIF error: The FAO Code \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Please check the material used for pack {1}.

resource.name: SifErrorSize
resource.object: SIF error: The species size \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Please check the size on the material used for pack {1}.

resource.name: SifErrorQuality
resource.object: SIF error: The quality \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Please check the Quality on the material used for pack {1}.

resource.name: SifErrorProductForm
resource.object: SIF error: The product form \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Please check the Condition on the material used for pack {1}.

resource.name: SifErrorCondition
resource.object: SIF error: The product condition \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Please check the Conservation on the material used for pack {1}.

resource.name: SifErrorCatchAreaId
resource.object: SIF error: The waters \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Make sure waters on haul/vessel-lot {1} is correct.

resource.name: SifErrorGearTypeId
resource.object: SIF error: The fishing gear \"{0}\" is not valid in SIF. Make sure fishing gear on haul/vessel-lot {1} is correct.

resource.name: SifErrorInsufficientPrivileges
resource.object: SIF error: Your SIF login doesn't have privileges to send data on behalf of the vessel {0}.

resource.name: SiteNotFound
resource.object: The site {0} was not found, can't get SIF prefix for catch owner.

resource.name: SiteNoPrefix
resource.object: The site {0} contains no SIF prefix in ExtCode.

resource.name: ErrorLotNoVessel
resource.object: The vessel-lot {0}/{1} has no vessel defined (as SlHouse)

resource.name: ErrorCompanyNoBusinessId
resource.object: The vessel {0}/{1} has no BusinessId defined in the column External code

resource.name: SifErrorInsufficientPrivilegesBox
resource.object: SIF WS: Your SIF login doesn't have privileges to send data on this box {0}.

resource.name: TraceCreateCatchCC
resource.object: Creating catch - Vessel-lot. ID={0} Vessel={1} Vessel-lot={2}.

resource.name: TraceCreateCatchSuccess
resource.object: Finished creating catch with success.

resource.object: The configured Export Handler is not of correct type

resource.object: The configured Export handler is not of type Sif Export Handler

resource.object: Connection to DK Elog failed

resource.name: ConnectionToElogWebException
resource.object: Connecting to DK Elog failed with webexception

resource.name: ConnectionToElogWebExceptionConnect
resource.object: Can't connect to DK Elog. Please check that Elog is started and cables are ok. Then close Marine Pack window and try again

resource.name: LicenseException
resource.object: Exporting to electronic logbook requires a license. This license is not installed.

resource.object: ExportToDkElog - failed with export exception

resource.object: ExportToDkElog - failed with export exception - no boxes

resource.object: Start Ftp transmission of

resource.object: FTP transfer completed to

resource.name: FTPtransferFatalError-SeeLogForDetails

resource.name: Transferred
resource.object: Transferred

resource.name: MoreThanOneBuyerUsingFirst
resource.object: Der er mere end 1 køber({0})- bruger den første når der laves csv SIF sporbarheds eksport fil
